MOVING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. ALL FURTHER MOTIONS IN THIS CASE TO BE NOTICED IN DEPARTMENT 302. DEPARTMENT 501 HANDLES ALL LAW & MOTION MATTERS FOR CIVIL CASES ARISING OUT OF OWNERSHIP OF REAL PROPERTY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY, ACQUISITION OF REAL PROPERTY, AND DAMAGE TO REAL PROPERTY (EXCEPT CONSTRUCTION DEFECT CASES). Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Marc Stimpert, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Judy Fann Kummer, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant San Francisco Window & Door Company, Inc.
Plaintiffs' first amended complaint for breach of contract was filed on July 5, 2016.
Order substituting San Francisco Window & Door Company, Inc. for DOE 2 was filed on January 24, 2018.
Substitute service of first amended complaint on defendant San Francisco Window & Door Company, Inc. was effectuated on February 11, 2018. (Mailed February 1, 2018).
Dismissal as to defendants Mark Davies & Davies Construction was filed February 21, 2018.
Dismissal of Cross-Complaint by Mark Davies and Davies Construction was filed on March 29, 2018.
Dismissal as to defendant Moonlit Builders, Inc. was filed on April 16, 2018.
Default as to defendant San Francisco Window & Door Company, Inc. entered March 15, 2018.
DOES 3-20 were dismissed on September 4, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Judy Fann Kummer and Brian Kummer, as Trustees for the Kummer Family Trust U/T/D September 19, 2011, and against the Defaulted Defendant San Francisco Window & Door Company, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $75,007.00.

Total - $75,007.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
